output.coordination_recommendation: Unsynchronised settlement carries open principal risk. Upgrade to HTLC, shared-ledger lock, or notary-signature coordination. Consider BIS Agorá unifying-ledger / ECB Pontes TARGET-link / DTCC Collateral AppChain pattern.
